feed.backendFallback: Backend API is unavailable, so typed fixture content is displayed.
feed.loadFailed: Could not load that feed. Fixture content is still available.
feed.followingHint: Follow creators to build this feed

novel.fallbackSummary: Tap to read the full story

drawer.title: Post details
drawer.sampleCommentBody1: This layout feels calm and easy to follow.
drawer.sampleCommentBody2: Saving this for my next reset session.
drawer.sampleCommentBody3: The details make the whole note more useful.
drawer.protectedPackageDescription: {count} images must be viewed from a viewer-watermarked ZIP package.
drawer.protectedPackageAllImagesDescription: All {count} images are included; protected images receive a viewer-specific trace watermark.
drawer.imageArchiveDescription: This post has {count} images. Above the admin threshold of {threshold}, a ZIP is prepared automatically in the background.
drawer.imageArchiveWorking: Processed {current}/{total} images. Publishing and browsing remain available.
drawer.imageArchiveFailed: The ZIP could not be generated. Please retry later.
drawer.imageArchivePurchaseRequired: Purchase and unlock the full post before downloading all images.
drawer.imageArchiveDownloadStarted: The all-images ZIP download has started.
drawer.protectedQueueInfo: {count} jobs in queue; position {position}; estimated wait about {seconds}s.

protectedStages.watermark_stream_unavailable: Progress stream unavailable; using standard processing

protectedErrors.watermark: Watermark verification failed after multiple parameter profiles. Retry below.
protectedErrors.source: An image source is temporarily unavailable. Please retry.
protectedErrors.empty: No protected images are available for this package.
protectedErrors.selectionChanged: The protected image selection changed. Please generate the package again.
protectedErrors.watermarkServerUnavailable: The watermark server is unavailable. Confirm the service is running and the URL is configured correctly.
protectedErrors.watermarkServerTimeout: The watermark server timed out. Retry later or increase the timeout.
protectedErrors.watermarkServerRejected: The watermark server rejected the request. Check service logs and watermark parameters.
protectedErrors.partialSkipped: Some protected images failed and were skipped within the admin failure tolerance. The ZIP includes only verified images.

drawer.protectedPackageRegenerating: The previous ZIP expired and is being regenerated automatically.
drawer.protectedPackageReadyDescription: The ZIP is ready to download. You can also copy the link and open it in your current signed-in session.
drawer.protectedPackageLinkCopyFailed: Could not copy the download link.
drawer.purchaseDescription: Unlock {direct} direct-view images and {protected} protected images.
drawer.purchaseConfirmDescription: Pay {price} using {method}. The author's payment method applies to the whole post.

points.title: Not enough points
points.description: You do not have enough points to unlock this post. Open Wallet to learn how to earn more.

balance.title: Not enough Moon Coins
balance.description: You do not have enough Moon Coins to unlock this post. Recharge in Wallet and try again.

drawer.authorPaidNoticeDescription: Your images stay visible to you. Other users need to pay {price} {method} to unlock them.
drawer.purchasersDescription: Users who have unlocked this post.
drawer.purchasersError: Could not load purchasers. Please try again later.
drawer.purchasersEmpty: No users have purchased this yet.

novel.subtitle: A troubled redemption in the name of love
